questions.q: Express 0.02 as a percentage.
questions.exp: To convert decimal to percentage, multiply by 100. 0.02 × 100 = 2%.

questions.q: What is the result of dividing 25 by 0.25?

questions.exp: 24% = 24/100. Divide both by 4: 6/25. This is already in lowest terms.

questions.exp: Fifteen thousand = 15,000. And twenty three = 23. Together: 15,023.

questions.q: Write down all the factors of 18.
questions.exp: Factors of 18 are all numbers that divide 18 exactly: 1, 2, 3, 6, 9 and 18.

questions.exp: ³⁄₉ = ¹⁄₃, not ½. All others simplify to ½.

questions.q: A set of textbooks cost Le168,000.00. What will be the cost in dollars if $1.00 = Le8,400.00?

It takes 15 days for 6 men to dig a toilet pit. How long will it take 5 men to dig the same toilet pit if they work at the same rate?
questions.exp: More men = fewer days. 6 men × 15 days = 90 man-days. 5 men: 90 ÷ 5 = 18 days.

questions.q: The sum of the angles on a straight line is:
questions.exp: Angles on a straight line always add up to 180°.

questions.q: Determine the difference in the weight recorded in July and May. (From Figure VI bar chart)
questions.exp: From the bar chart: July ≈ 6 kg, May ≈ 2 kg. Difference = 6 − 2 = 4 kg.

2026.subject: Mathematics
2026.instructions: Answer all the questions. Each question is followed by four options lettered A to D. Find the correct option for each question. Shade in pencil on your answer sheet the answer space which bears the same letter as the option you have chosen. Give only one answer to each question. (NPSE 03 — May 2026, West African Examinations Council)

questions.q: Find the sum of 830, 211 and 1935.
The difference between 1935 and 1908 is
Simplify: 2¹⁄₃ + ³⁄₄ − 1¹⁄₂.
A bag contains 648 apples to be shared among boys. How many will each receive?
questions.exp: 648 ÷ 40 (implied number of boys from context) = 16. Answer C (16). Note: the...

Change 0.375 to a fraction in its lowest term.

Find the value of p in Figure 1. (A straight line with an angle of 75° shown — p and 75° are on the same straight line.)
questions.exp: Angles on a straight line add up to 180°. p + 75° = 180°. p = 105°. Answer C.

What is the value of the angle marked m in Figure 2? (A triangle with angles 57°, 65° and m.)
questions.exp: Angles in a triangle sum to 180°. m = 180° − 57° − 65° = 58°. Answer D.

questions.exp: 0.08 is the smallest of all the decimals listed. Answer C.

questions.q: How much will an investor pay for three days in the Hotel if 1 day = 24 hours?
questions.exp: 24 hours is in 16–24 range = Le850 per day. 3 days = 3 × Le850 = Le2,550.00. ...

How long will it take a motorist to cover a distance of 400 km at a speed of 80 km/h?
questions.exp: Time = Distance ÷ Speed = 400 ÷ 80 = 5 hours. Answer B.

questions.q: Which set of people like rice only?
questions.exp: Rice only (inside the circle but not in the overlap) = 17 and 4. Answer B.

A girl's average mark for 6 subjects is 82. What is her total mark?
questions.exp: Total = Average × Number of subjects = 82 × 6 = 492. Answer A.

questions.exp: From Figure 5: Alie = 20N, Janet = 40N. Sum = 20 + 40 = 60N. Answer C.

questions.exp: From Figure 5, Kai's bar reaches approximately 80N. Answer B.
